notes: Public DeFindex testnet USDC vault uses Blend-issued USDC (CAQCF...), not Circle testnet USDC (CBIELT...). YieldFlow payroll currently earns on Circle USDC via direct Blend pool CAPBMX. DeFindex is integrated for live strategy/TVL data and is the target router when asset IDs align (mainnet Circle USDC or after a swap bridge).
